fields.summary: Specifies a color override for a single entry in a font color palette.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` replaces a specific color slot in a CPAL font palette when
cloning a typeface via <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides>. Set
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index> to the zero-based palette entry index and
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Color> to the replacement color encoded as an
`SKColor` value (`0xAARRGGBB`).

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Override the first palette color with red
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { PaletteOverrides = overrides };
using var styled = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement color for the palette entry.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> value (<c>0xAARRGGBB</c>) to substitute for the palette entry at <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index" />.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both instances have equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified object.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> with the same values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
fields.returns: A hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the palette entry to override.
fields.value: The index of the color slot in the CPAL palette to replace.
